title: Spring One
description:
A radio show to accompany the Sound/Image Cinema Lab series at Verdant Taproom, in partnership with Brewing Folk, Bosena, Anti-WORLDS and Myskatonic. Presented by Professor Neil Fox, Sound/Image Cinema Lab, Falmouth University.

NB: Some songs contain lyrics featuring language some listeners may deem offensive.
playlist:
Kan Me – Gwenno [Theme Song for Sounds of Fylm]
Here – Pavement
The Mastermind (Opening Credits) – Rob Mazurek
Some Absolute End (The End) – Bill Ryder-Jones
Lonely Woman – Tony Kofi Quartet
Tresor – Gwenno
Spring Folk Song – Sarah Moody
Wake Up N*****s – The Last Poets
Samurai Code Quote #5 – Forest Whitaker / Ghost Dog
Fast Shadow – Wu Tang Clan
Mother Sky – CAN
